postings: In 2025 Google DeepMind posted multiple openings for machine‑learning‑focused roles, including a Research Scientist/Research Engineer working on AI for secure code, a Research Scientist in multimodal generative AI based in Singapore, a Research Engineer on frontier safety risk assessment tasked with measuring and mitigating catastrophic risks from advanced AI systems, as well as related positions such as a Product Manager for the Gemini app and a Senior Data Scientist for GeminiApp ecosystems, with opportunities located across London, Mountain View, Kirkland, New York City and other sites for candidates experienced in machine learning, large language models, AI safety and research engineering.
velocity: In the final month of 2025, Google DeepMind posted roughly 25‑30 new AI and machine learning positions, ranging from Machine Learning Engineer and Research Scientist to senior research engineering roles such as Senior Staff Research Engineer, AI Tutor, and Applied Robotics Engineer, with openings across its U.S. hubs (Mountain View, San Francisco, Los Angeles) and its London office.
